title: Ilaka (peddupettai)
desc: Crime drama about Kumar, a man who rises from a slum to become a powerful figure in the underworld after witnessing his mother's murder. Driven by ambition and vengeance, he navigates betrayal and crime.

title: Sun Zara
desc: Trisha is mesmerised by aspiring singer Rohit's voice. After the two fall in love, Trisha meets with an accident and loses her eyesight.

title: Salaam-E-Ishq
desc: Salaam-e-ishq is a story that weaves six love stories together from different walks of life, in the bustling city of Mumbai. Ignorant about each other's existence, but end up being brought together by destiny, fate and LOVE. Set in the themes of betrayal, love and forgiveness , the film navigates the ups and downs and complexities of the modern relationships.

title: Maqbool
desc: In Mumbai's criminal underworld, the lord of all lords is Jahangir Khan (Pankaj Kapoor). Those loyal to him include Maqbool (Irfan Khan), his chief. But Maqbool is in love with Nimmi (Tabu), Jahangir's mistress, who convinces him to be ambitious and take over the empire. After maneuvering potential rivals out of the way, Maqbool betrays Jahangir, murdering him in his own bed. However, it isn't long before both Maqbool and Nimmi are haunted by the ghosts of their treacherous deeds.

title: Munna Baba(dub) (unakaga Ellam Unakka Tamil)
desc: Sakthi, a rich spoilt brat falls for Indhu. His father, Vinu meets his friend Jayaganesh and they agree on a marriage proposal for their children. Sakthi wants to break the deal because he loves Indhu and wants to marry her, but he does not realise that Indhu is Jayaganesh's daughter. He tries to break the engagement by asking his cousins to misbehave and indulge in a fight. Ultimately in the end, the two get married.
